creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sat Jan  4 08:21:28 2014
New Revision: 338626
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338626

Log:
  - reset maintainer
  
  PR:		185461
  Submitted by:	maintainer, c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com

Modified:
  head/mail/alpine/Makefile

Modified: head/mail/alpine/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/alpine/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 08:03:35 2014	(r338625)
+++ head/mail/alpine/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 08:21:28 2014	(r338626)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ CATEGORIES?=	mail news ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.cac.washington.edu/alpine/
 DIST_SUBDIR=	alpine-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT?=	Mail and news client descended from Pine
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE+=	THREADS MOUSE NLS ISPELL NOSPELL
